unit.note: Server vitest 162 files / 1896 tests green (F0 gate, SHIPWRIGHT_NETWORK_PROFILE=local) + client vitest 202 files / 1971 tests green (AC3); combined 3867. Both workspace builds green (tsc --noEmit clean; client vite build). D07 touches client/src/hooks/useLaunchMasterRun.ts (F06 project-scoped master-shadow reuse) + server/src/external/launch/master-run-branch.ts (F34 stamp parentRunMaster+runId) and their vitest suites (useLaunchMasterRun.test.ts 10 tests, master-run-branch.test.ts 19, new master-run-branch.stamp.test.ts 3).

integration.note: No separate integration harness. The launch route + sdk-sessions.json persist round-trip (masterRun launch -> store.patch stamp -> persist -> guard scan) is covered by the server vitest route tests recorded under unit, plus a throwaway on-disk round-trip probe.

e2e.note: No Playwright run. D07 is internal launch-logic hardening with no new UI-consumed contract: the client hook change project-scopes an in-hook lookup using projectId already present on the tasks MasterRunLaunchButton passes (call signature unchanged, no new prop/DOM/render); the server change stamps two existing fields into the launch taskUpdate (surfaced to the UI only via the pre-existing 409 error path). No Vite-config/proxy/WS-origin/CORS surface changed, so a browser smoke adds no signal the deterministic client+server Vitest already provides. F0.5 surface=none.

surface_verification.justification: Internal launch-logic hardening with no new UI-consumed contract: the client half (useLaunchMasterRun.ts) project-scopes an in-hook master-shadow lookup using projectId already present on the tasks the MasterRunLaunchButton passes (call signature unchanged, no new prop/DOM/render); the server half stamps parentRunMaster+runId into the launch taskUpdate (surfaced to the UI only via the pre-existing 409 error path). No Vite-config/proxy/WS-origin/CORS change, so a browser smoke adds no signal a deterministic unit test lacks. AC2 correctness proven by RED-first client Vitest (useLaunchMasterRun.test.ts F06: project B never reuses A's shadow) + server Vitest (master-run-branch.stamp.test.ts F34: plain launch stamps parentRunMaster+runId, second master 409s) + a throwaway on-disk sdk-sessions.json round-trip probe (stamp survives serialize->disk->reload).

behaviors.behavior: AC1 - master-shadow reuse is project-scoped (F06): launching the single-session master on a project never reuses/resumes a DIFFERENT project's master that shares the same runId (duplicated project dir). And a direct-API masterRun launch stamps parentRunMaster+runId (F34) so every attached master is visible to the double-master guard.
behaviors.evidence: client/src/hooks/useLaunchMasterRun.test.ts (F06 cross-project isolation + absent-scope guard) + server/src/external/launch/__tests__/master-run-branch.stamp.test.ts (F34 stamp + 409 guard visibility + dryRun-no-stamp). Throwaway on-disk sdk-sessions.json round-trip probe confirmed the stamp survives serialize->disk->reload.

behaviors.behavior: AC2 - a NEW regression proof is RED on pre-fix main and GREEN after
behaviors.evidence: RED captured on pre-fix tree: client F06 reused project A's 't-projectA-master' instead of creating B's own; server F34 left parentRunMaster undefined and the second masterRun returned 200 instead of 409. All GREEN after the fix.

behaviors.behavior: AC3 - full server + client suites stay green (no invariant/ADR regressed)
behaviors.evidence: F0: server vitest 1896/1896 (SHIPWRIGHT_NETWORK_PROFILE=local) + client vitest 1971/1971; both builds green. CLAUDE.md read-only-observer rules 1/12 intact (no writes to ~/.claude/projects/** or shipwright_run_config.json; runId stamped from the re-read config, never client-supplied). W3 double-master project-scoping + fresh-vs-resume selection preserved.

behaviors.behavior: AC4 - files stay within the expected footprint; bloat baseline not ratcheted
behaviors.evidence: Footprint files: useLaunchMasterRun.ts (193 LOC), useLaunchMasterRun.test.ts (197), master-run-branch.ts (168), master-run-branch.test.ts (295, unchanged, held < 300). F34 tests split into a new cohesive master-run-branch.stamp.test.ts (158) to avoid a NEW 300-LOC crossing on the existing test file. shipwright_bloat_baseline.json unchanged (no ratchet); none of the touched files are baselined.
